positive: A stylized, maximalist celestial forest scene viewed through a geometric window. Central focus on large, glowing abstract flora and fauna silhouettes. The foreground features intricate linework elements like crystalline branches and lunar compass motifs. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and suitable for a repeating pattern print on fabric. Limited color palette of deep sapphire blues, iridescent gold, and matte cream. High contrast, elegant vaporwave aesthetic with a touch of art deco symmetry. Vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing, clean edges, flat color blocking, highly detailed negative space.
